recommendations.title: Rudolph's Shiny New Year
recommendations.genres: Animation, Fantasy, Family, TV Movie, Comedy
recommendations.overview: Rudolph must find Happy, the baby new year, before the midnight of New Year's Eve.

recommendations.title: The Return of the King
recommendations.overview: Two Hobbits struggle to destroy the Ring in Mount Doom while their friends desperately fight evil Lord Sauron's forces in a final battle.

recommendations.title: The Little Drummer Boy
recommendations.overview: After being kidnapped and escaping, young drummer boy Aaron searches for his camel and finds him in the Nativity of the Baby Jesus. Aaron gives Baby Jesus the only gift he has, a song on his drum.
recommendations.director: Takeo Nakamura, Arthur Rankin, Jr., Jules Bass

recommendations.title: The Hobbit
recommendations.genres: Family, Fantasy, Animation, Adventure, TV Movie
recommendations.overview: The story follows the adventures of Bilbo Baggins, a diminutive creative who resides in a place called Middle-Earth before he is compelled to go on a quest to find a treasure buried deep in the heart of the Lonely Mountain.

recommendations.title: The Last Unicorn

recommendations.title: Santa Claus Is Comin' to Town
recommendations.overview: A postman, S.D. Kluger, decides to answer some of the most common questions about Santa Claus, and tells us about a baby named Kris who is raised by a family of elf toymakers named Kringle. When Kris grows up, he wants to deliver toys to the children

recommendations.title: The Year Without a Santa Claus
recommendations.overview: Feeling forgotten by the children of the world, old St. Nick decides to skip his gift-giving journey and take a vacation. Mrs. Claus and two spunky little elves, Jingle and Jangle, set out to see to where all the season's cheer has disappeared. Aided

recommendations.title: The Flight of Dragons
recommendations.overview: The realm of magic is being threatened by the realm of logic, so the green wizard, Carolinus, decides to shield it for all time. Ommadon, the evil red wizard, stands in his way. Carolinus then calls for a quest that is to be led by a man named Peter

recommendations.title: The Snowman
recommendations.overview: A young boy makes a snowman one Christmas Eve, which comes to life at midnight and takes him on a magical adventure to the North Pole to meet Santa Claus.
